findings.title: High Memory Usage in Backend API
findings.risk: May cause out-of-memory crashes during production traffic spikes. Critical for reliability.
findings.description: Memory usage peaks at 85% during high-load tests. Event listeners not being cleaned up properly in data processing pipeline. Process restarts every 2-3 hours under sustained load.
findings.recommendation: Profile Node.js process with clinic.js or node --inspect. Identify and fix event listener leaks in document extraction service. Consider implementing memory pooling for large payload processing.

findings.title: Database Connection Pool Exhaustion
findings.risk: API becomes unresponsive when connection pool depletes. Users cannot process documents.
findings.description: PostgreSQL connection pool reaches 95 connections (max 100) during concurrent extraction. Connections not returning to pool properly after queries complete.
findings.recommendation: Increase pool size to 150-200. Implement connection timeout of 30s. Add query timeout enforcement. Monitor with pg_stat_activity.

findings.title: Slow API Response Time (avg 850ms)
findings.risk: Poor user experience. UI timeouts possible on mobile networks.
findings.description: Average API response time for /api/schemas endpoint is 850ms. Queries taking >1s on 20% of requests. N+1 query problem identified in schema list endpoint.
findings.recommendation: Implement eager loading for schema relationships. Add query result caching (Redis). Index frequently-queried columns. Consider denormalizing schema metadata.

findings.title: Missing Input Validation on File Upload
findings.risk: Potential for malicious file uploads. Could crash server or enable code execution.
findings.description: File upload endpoint does not validate file content. Only checks file extension. No size limit enforcement. No MIME type validation.
findings.recommendation: Implement comprehensive file validation: MIME type check, file signature verification, size limits (max 100MB per file), virus scan integration (ClamAV).

findings.title: No Rate Limiting on API Endpoints
findings.risk: Vulnerability to DoS attacks. API can be overwhelmed by requests.
findings.description: API endpoints have no rate limiting. Single IP can make unlimited requests. No throttling on CPU-intensive endpoints like /api/extract.
findings.recommendation: Implement token bucket rate limiting: 100 req/min for public endpoints, 1000 req/min for authenticated. Use redis-based rate limiter (ratelimit library).

findings.title: TLS Certificate Expiring in 30 Days
findings.risk: Website will show security warnings. HTTPS will fail. Data transmission compromised.
findings.description: SSL/TLS certificate for audit-safe-document-extractor.com expires on 2026-08-15. No auto-renewal configured.
findings.recommendation: Enable Let's Encrypt auto-renewal with certbot. Implement certificate monitoring (certspotter, cert-monitor). Set renewal reminder at 60 days before expiry.

findings.title: No Database Backup Strategy
findings.risk: Data loss if database crashes. No recovery possible. Business continuity affected.
findings.description: Production database has no automated backups. No WAL archiving. No replication. Single point of failure.
findings.recommendation: Implement daily automated backups (pg_dump to S3). Enable PITR with WAL archiving. Set up streaming replication to standby. Test restore procedures monthly.

findings.title: Frontend Bundle Size Too Large (2.1MB)
findings.risk: Slow page load on mobile networks. Higher bounce rate. Poor SEO.
findings.description: Frontend JavaScript bundle is 2.1MB gzipped. Includes unused dependencies. Code splitting not implemented. All libraries loaded on initial page load.
findings.recommendation: Implement code splitting (React.lazy + Suspense). Remove unused dependencies (uuid, lodash). Tree-shake Material-UI. Use dynamic imports for routes.

findings.title: Insufficient Error Logging
findings.risk: Cannot debug production issues. Root cause analysis impossible. Extended MTTR.
findings.description: API logs lack context. Stack traces incomplete. Request IDs not tracked across services. Error aggregation not implemented.
findings.recommendation: Implement structured logging (winston/pino). Add request correlation IDs. Log all errors to centralized system (ELK or CloudWatch). Implement error alerting.

findings.title: Missing Health Check Endpoints
findings.risk: Cannot reliably detect when API is down. Load balancer cannot route traffic correctly. False traffic sends to dead servers.
findings.description: No /health endpoint. Load balancer using TCP health check only (not ideal). Readiness probe not implemented for Kubernetes.
findings.recommendation: Add /health endpoint returning status of all dependencies (db, cache, queue). Add /ready endpoint for Kubernetes. Implement circuit breaker for dependency checks.

findings.title: No Automated Deployment Pipeline
findings.risk: Manual deployments error-prone. Deployment takes 30+ minutes. No rollback strategy.
findings.description: Deployments are manual via SSH and git pull. No tests run before deployment. No rollback mechanism. Database migrations manual.
findings.recommendation: Implement GitOps with GitHub Actions. Automate testing, build, push to registry. Use Docker Compose or Kubernetes for deployment. Implement blue-green deployments.

findings.title: Missing Monitoring and Alerting
findings.risk: Issues discovered by users instead of monitoring. Long MTTR. SLA violations.
findings.description: No application monitoring (APM). No metrics collection. No alerts configured. Cannot detect anomalies.
findings.recommendation: Implement monitoring: Prometheus for metrics, Grafana for dashboards, ELK for logs. Set up alerts for: CPU>80%, Memory>80%, Errors>1%, ResponseTime>2s
